property_zones.name: Residential District
property_zones.ordinance: All tree work requires ISA Certified arborist. High-risk trees require Tree Risk Assessment certification.

property_zones.name: Commercial District
property_zones.ordinance: Trees over 60cm diameter require Tree Risk Assessment. All species inspections need ISA Certified.

property_zones.name: Historic District
property_zones.ordinance: All tree inspections require Tree Risk Assessment certification regardless of risk level.
